desc: Inclusion-criteria clause added to the abstract
Old broad definition struck; two-criteria definition added
Explicit exclusions: instruction following, vanilla RLHF/DPO, language-conditioned RL
Specification-time boundary case (reward-code generation)
Modality scope: feedback is natural-language text; observations may be non-textual
Terminology genealogy: explicit generalization of Shinn et al. (2023)
Positioning against prior surveys and NLRL; pointer to comparison table
New contribution bullet: decision rules and hybrid-cases table
New contribution bullet: practitioner guidance and survey comparison
Explicit assignment rule for multi-pillar methods
MDP-as-lens caveat: partially observable, non-Markovian settings
New hybrid-cases table
Pillars classify signals, not pipeline stages; working example reframed
Specification-time clarification; hybrid-table pointer for reward code
Memory classified by moment of consumption; boundary recorded
Renamed to Evaluator Feedback in Search; inclusion criterion stated
Online vs offline preference optimization distinction
Vanilla RLHF/DPO placed outside VRL as compression-spectrum endpoint
New subsection: Algorithmic Interactions and Practitioner Guidance
Evaluation practice: report quality and utilization separately
Research agenda with five named open problems
Failure modes and societal-impact expansion
New comparison-with-surveys table
New practitioner guidance table
